tool.name: Create Collapse Session
tool.description: Create a new Collapse Engine session to begin transforming an analogy into a research artifact.

description.description: Description of what this session will explore

use_sub_agents.description: Enable sub-agent spawning for parallel work

ai.systemPromptSection:
### create_collapse_session
Create a new Collapse Engine session to explore an analogy between two systems.

usageExamples.input: {"name": "Physics-ML Analogy", "description": "Exploring structural correspondences between statistical mechanics and neural network optimization", "tags": ["physics", "ml", "optimization"]}

whenToUse: User wants to explore an analogy formally
User mentions two systems that might have structural correspondence
